demo_blocked_features.reason: Demo build caps ship cargo capacity to 6 kg; full build uses the standard 500 kg capacity.
demo_blocked_features.hint: Demo: 6 kg cap, full build: 500 kg.

demo_blocked_features.reason: Demo derelicts seed a single hazard; full build derelicts seed up to three.
demo_blocked_features.hint: Demo: 1 hazard, full build: up to 3 hazards.

demo_blocked_features.reason: Demo refuses further saves after 20 minutes of active play; existing saves are kept.
demo_blocked_features.hint: Demo: saves refused past 20 min, full build: unlimited.

demo_blocked_features.reason: Demo does not persist cross-run world state (ADR-0012 deferred).
demo_blocked_features.hint: Demo: per-run only, full build: cross-run persistence.

demo_blocked_features.reason: Hub/meta progression is deferred through Gate 2 per ADR-0003.
demo_blocked_features.hint: Demo: skip hub, full build: skip hub (Gate 3).
